checks.question: Did the Supabase schema work land cleanly and reach a verifiable database state?
checks.guidance: Confirm the new migration files exist, then verify clean reset/apply and target-project availability before accepting runtime criteria.

findings.detail: The new Discord-sync migration files, rollback doc, and health SQL are present under `supabase/migrations/` and `supabase/sql/`.

`supabase db reset --no-seed --yes` still fails at pre-existing migration `20260320000000_multi_server.sql` (`column c.speaker_mode does not exist`), so the new migration stack was not verified end-to-end on a clean reset.

The linked Supabase project still lacked `asset_comments`, `media_import_jobs`, `internal.discord_promote_resources(...)`, and both Discord cron jobs during executor verification, so the rollout-dependent must criteria were not completed.

checks.question: Does the promoter implementation match the settled SQL-native design?
checks.guidance: Check for anti-join inserts, member prefiltering, guild propagation, dry-run logging, attachment reconciliation, and system_logs column correctness.

findings.detail: `internal.discord_promote_resources(dry_run BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE)` is implemented as `SECURITY DEFINER`, uses `WHERE NOT EXISTS` + `ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`, copies `m.guild_id`, maps channel `1149372684220768367` to `workflow` and others to `lora`, and logs through `logger_name, level, message, extra`.
The scratch repro noted in T21 passed after fixing the partial-index `ON CONFLICT` target issue, so the idempotent insert path is now aligned with DEC-013.
The required staging dry-run/live verification was not completed because the target project never had the new function/tables deployed.

checks.question: Does the media importer match the rehosting design and existing Cloudflare webhook contract?
checks.guidance: Check claiming, backoff, Stream handoff, metadata/classification, and webhook lookup compatibility; separate code correctness from unexecuted smoke tests.

findings.detail: `discord-media-importer` claims jobs with `FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED` when a DB URL is available, uploads to Storage, hands videos to Cloudflare without polling, inserts media/junction rows, and backs off to `failed` after 5 attempts.
The importer writes `cloudflare_stream_uid`, matching the existing webhook lookup contract.
No seeded staging smoke test, failure-path exercise, or URL curl verification was completed because `media_import_jobs` was absent on the linked project.

checks.question: Do the frontend hook and resource UI changes fully match the accepted data/query contract?
checks.guidance: Verify the markdown swap, Discord badges/links, and the exact `useAssetComments` filtering behavior.

findings.detail: `AssetDescription` wraps `MarkdownRenderer`; `ResourceDetail` and `ResourceModal` now render descriptions through it; ResourceDetail also renders Discord-only sections via `DiscordResourceSections`, and there is no hard-coded `GUILD_ID` in the website code.
`useAssetComments` does not filter `asset_comment_media.is_deleted = false` in the query itself. It fetches `is_deleted` from the junction rows and filters deleted links client-side after retrieval.

pre_check_flags.detail: No changed files were detected in the git diff, so review cannot confirm that package source changed.
Diff size sanity check found no changed lines, versus a rough expectation of about 10 lines from the issue context (files=0, hunks=0).

criteria.name: All Phase 1 migrations apply cleanly via `supabase db reset` on a scratch branch (including `internal.secrets` with no pre-existing value and the new partial index on `discord_messages`)
criteria.evidence: Executor evidence for T3/T21 shows `supabase db reset --no-seed --yes` still fails at pre-existing migration `20260320000000_multi_server.sql` with `column c.speaker_mode does not exist`, so clean end-to-end application of the Discord-sync migration set was not achieved.

criteria.name: `assets` gains source, discord_guild_id, discord_channel_id, discord_thread_id, imported_at, last_synced_at, reactions_reached_threshold_at, is_hidden plus unique partial index on discord_thread_id
criteria.evidence: Implemented in `supabase/migrations/20260423000000_assets_discord_import_cols.sql` with all requested columns plus `assets_discord_thread_id_unique`, `assets_source_idx`, and `assets_is_hidden_idx`.

criteria.name: `asset_comments` includes `discord_guild_id BIGINT NOT NULL` in addition to the other specified columns; `asset_comment_media` exists with `is_deleted`; `media_import_jobs` exists with the specified columns and indexes; all FKs target `members(member_id)`
criteria.evidence: `20260423000001_asset_comments.sql` creates `asset_comments` with `discord_guild_id BIGINT NOT NULL`, `author_member_id REFERENCES public.members(member_id)`, and `asset_comment_media` with `is_deleted`; `20260423000002_media_import_jobs.sql` creates `media_import_jobs` with the requested shape and indexes.

criteria.name: `asset_media` gains is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
criteria.evidence: `supabase/migrations/20260423000001_asset_comments.sql` adds `ALTER TABLE public.asset_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;`

criteria.name: RLS enabled on all new tables; asset_comments / asset_comment_media have public-read SELECT filtered by is_deleted=false; media_import_jobs and internal.secrets have no policies (service-role / postgres only)
criteria.evidence: `20260423000001_asset_comments.sql` enables RLS and adds public read policies on `asset_comments` and `asset_comment_media`; `20260423000002_media_import_jobs.sql` and `20260423000003_internal_secrets_bootstrap.sql` enable RLS without adding policies.

criteria.name: `internal.secrets` is postgres-owned with RLS enabled; `internal.get_service_role_key()` is SECURITY DEFINER with EXECUTE only to postgres; migration applies cleanly without a pre-seeded secret
criteria.evidence: File content matches the requirement in `20260423000003_internal_secrets_bootstrap.sql`, but clean application could not be verified because the repo-wide migration reset fails earlier at an unrelated migration.

criteria.name: Partial composite index `discord_messages_resource_op_idx ON discord_messages (channel_id, reaction_count DESC) WHERE message_id = thread_id AND is_deleted = FALSE` exists and is used by the promoter's discovery query (confirmed via EXPLAIN ANALYZE)
criteria.evidence: The index DDL is present in `20260423000004_discord_messages_resource_op_idx.sql`, but the executor could not verify existence/usage with `EXPLAIN ANALYZE` because the schema was not applied to the target database.

criteria.name: `internal.discord_promote_resources(dry_run BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE)` exists, is SECURITY DEFINER, and is callable via pg_cron without HTTP
criteria.evidence: `20260423000005_discord_promoter_fn.sql` defines the function as `SECURITY DEFINER`; `20260424000000_schedule_discord_promoter.sql` schedules it directly with `cron.schedule(... $$ SELECT internal.discord_promote_resources(); $$)` and no HTTP hop.

criteria.name: Promoter populates `assets.discord_guild_id` and `asset_comments.discord_guild_id` from `discord_messages.guild_id` on every new row; values are non-NULL and match the source message
criteria.evidence: The promoter inserts `m.guild_id` into both tables (`20260423000005_discord_promoter_fn.sql`), and T21's scratch repro script passed with one imported asset and one imported comment both carrying non-null `discord_guild_id`.

criteria.name: Dry-run `SELECT * FROM internal.discord_promote_resources(dry_run := TRUE)` returns expected counts, writes a single `system_logs` row per channel with `logger_name='discord_resource_promoter'`, `level='info'`, `extra->>'dry_run'='true'`, and performs zero writes to assets/asset_comments/media_import_jobs
criteria.evidence: Executor T6 found the linked project still lacked `asset_comments`, `media_import_jobs`, `internal.discord_promote_resources(boolean)`, and the partial index, so the required dry-run verification was never executed on the target project.

criteria.name: All `system_logs` INSERTs use the real columns `logger_name, level, message, extra`; no reference to `component` or `payload`
criteria.evidence: Promoter and importer log writes use only `logger_name, level, message, extra` (`supabase/migrations/20260423000005_discord_promoter_fn.sql`, `supabase/functions/discord-media-importer/index.ts`).

criteria.name: Promoter discovery has no `created_at` time window; any qualifying OP of any age imports on the next tick
criteria.evidence: The promoter discovery queries in `20260423000005_discord_promoter_fn.sql` filter on channel/thread/reaction/deletion state and anti-join only; there is no `created_at` window.

criteria.name: Main asset INSERT includes `AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM assets a WHERE a.discord_thread_id = m.message_id)`; same for comments INSERT; drift is handled by separate conditional UPDATE; reruns yield `assets_inserted = assets_updated = comments_inserted = comments_updated = 0`
criteria.evidence: The promoter file contains both anti-joins plus separate drift UPDATEs, and T21's scratch repro rerun printed PASS with zero net new rows after the ON CONFLICT fix.

criteria.name: An OP older than 60 days manually updated to `reaction_count=5` is imported on the next promoter tick
criteria.evidence: The code has no date window, so the logic is aligned, but the specific late-threshold staging regression was not executed on a deployed target in this review context.

criteria.name: Promoter uses `WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM members ...)` prefilter on asset and comment inserts; missing-member rows are logged with `logger_name='discord_resource_promoter'` and `level='warning'`
criteria.evidence: Both the asset and comment insert paths use `EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.members ...)`, and missing OP members are logged via `logger_name='discord_resource_promoter'` / `level='warning'` in `20260423000005_discord_promoter_fn.sql`.

criteria.name: With a manually-deleted referenced `members` row, the promoter completes successfully, logs the skipped OP, and imports all other OPs
criteria.evidence: The skip/log path is present in code, but the deleted-member runtime regression was not executed on the linked project.

criteria.name: Promoter maps channel 1149372684220768367 -> type='workflow'; the four model-family channels -> type='lora'
criteria.evidence: The `CASE m.channel_id WHEN 1149372684220768367 THEN 'workflow' ELSE 'lora' END` mapping is used for both asset insert and drift update in `20260423000005_discord_promoter_fn.sql`.

criteria.name: `regexp_match(url, '/attachments/\d+/(\d+)/')` correctly extracts the attachment ID from a Discord CDN URL with `?ex=…&is=…&hm=…` query parameters
criteria.evidence: The promoter uses `regexp_match(... '/attachments/\d+/(\d+)/')` consistently for enqueue/reconcile paths; the pattern only matches the path portion and is unaffected by the query-string suffix.

criteria.name: A Discord edit that removes an attachment marks the corresponding junction row `is_deleted=TRUE` on the next promoter tick
criteria.evidence: `20260423000005_discord_promoter_fn.sql` updates both `asset_comment_media.is_deleted` and `asset_media.is_deleted` to `TRUE` when the attachment ID is no longer present in `discord_messages.attachments`.

criteria.name: A Discord message edit updates `asset_comments.content` and `discord_edited_at`; a Discord deletion sets `asset_comments.is_deleted=true`
criteria.evidence: The promoter's comment drift UPDATE writes `content`, `reaction_count`, `discord_edited_at`, reply linkage, author, and guild; the deletion reconciliation updates `asset_comments.is_deleted = TRUE` when source `discord_messages.is_deleted = TRUE`.

criteria.name: Media importer processes a seeded job end-to-end: creates a `media` row (Stream UID for video; Storage URL for image), creates the junction row, marks `status='done'` with `media_id`
criteria.evidence: Executor T10 could not run the seeded staging smoke test because the linked project did not yet have `media_import_jobs` or the rest of the Discord-sync schema deployed.

criteria.name: Video importer does NOT poll Cloudflare; existing `cloudflare-stream-webhook` populates `cloudflare_playback_hls_url` + `cloudflare_thumbnail_url`; duration is intentionally not promised
criteria.evidence: `supabase/functions/discord-media-importer/index.ts` only requests a Stream UID and never polls for readiness; T9 confirmed the importer writes `cloudflare_stream_uid`, matching the existing webhook contract, and there is no duration-handling code.

criteria.name: Rehosted video URLs return a valid HLS playlist (HTTP 200, `#EXTM3U` in body); image URLs return HTTP 200 with image content-type
criteria.evidence: No successful smoke test or curl verification was recorded because the importer smoke test never ran on a deployed target project.

criteria.name: A simulated failed job increments `attempts`, records `last_error`, is re-queued with growing `locked_until`, and moves to `status='failed'` after 5 attempts
criteria.evidence: `markJobFailed()` in `supabase/functions/discord-media-importer/index.ts` increments `attempts`, writes `last_error`, applies exponential backoff via `2 ** attempts`, and flips to `failed` at `JOB_MAX_ATTEMPTS = 5`.

criteria.name: pg_cron has two schedules: `discord-resource-promoter` (*/10, direct SQL to `internal.discord_promote_resources()`, dry_run=FALSE by default) and `discord-media-importer` (*/2, `net.http_post` with Authorization via `internal.get_service_role_key()`)
criteria.evidence: The migration files exist, but executor T11/T12 verified that the linked project still had neither Discord cron job present in `cron.job`.

criteria.name: `useResources`, `useCommunityResources`, `useCommunityResource`, `useUserProfile` all SELECT `source, discord_guild_id, discord_channel_id, discord_thread_id, is_hidden` and filter `is_hidden=false`
criteria.evidence: Implemented in `banodoco-website/src/pages/Resources/useResources.ts`, `src/hooks/useCommunityResources.ts`, `src/hooks/useCommunityResource.ts`, and `src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts`.

criteria.name: Shared `AssetDescription` component reuses (imports/wraps) or mirrors `banodoco-website/src/components/posts/MarkdownRenderer.tsx:122-126` (react-markdown + remarkGfm only); no separate sanitize/rehype layer is introduced; no custom embed tokens are registered
criteria.evidence: `banodoco-website/src/components/resources/AssetDescription.tsx` directly wraps `MarkdownRenderer`, but the criterion explicitly includes runtime UI inspection.

criteria.name: `ResourceDetail/index.tsx:166-169` renders description via `AssetDescription` for both manual and Discord-imported assets
criteria.evidence: `banodoco-website/src/pages/ResourceDetail/index.tsx` now renders `<AssetDescription markdown={resource.description} />`, but the criterion explicitly includes runtime UI inspection.

criteria.name: `ResourceModal.tsx:186-189` renders description via `AssetDescription`
criteria.evidence: `banodoco-website/src/pages/Resources/ResourceModal.tsx` now renders `<AssetDescription markdown={asset.description} />`.

criteria.name: ResourceDetail shows 'Made with this' grid, 'Discussion' thread, and 'From Discord' badge only when `resource.source === 'discord_import'`; manual assets render unchanged
criteria.evidence: `ResourceDetail` gates the new Discord UI behind `isDiscordImport` and delegates rendering to `DiscordResourceSections`, but browser/UI verification is not available in this review context.

criteria.name: Comment media and 'Made with this' tiles are anchor tags with `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"` pointing at the rehosted URL; no lightbox in v1
criteria.evidence: `DiscordResourceSections.tsx` renders both tile surfaces with `<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">`, but the criterion explicitly requires browser/UI verification.

criteria.name: 'View on Discord' links are built from the row's own `discord_guild_id` / `discord_thread_id` / `discord_message_id` (comment-level) or `discord_guild_id` / `discord_channel_id` / `discord_thread_id` (asset-level); the frontend code contains NO hard-coded `GUILD_ID` or equivalent guild constant
criteria.evidence: The site uses `buildDiscordMessageUrl(guildId, channelId, messageId)` and `rg -n "GUILD_ID" banodoco-website/src supabase` returned no matches, but the criterion explicitly requires browser/UI verification.

criteria.name: Each rendered comment shows author avatar + name, markdown content via `AssetDescription`, reply chip when applicable, attachment tiles, reaction count, and working 'View on Discord' link
criteria.evidence: `banodoco-website/src/components/resources/DiscordResourceSections.tsx` renders all of these elements in code, but runtime UI verification is outside this automated review.

criteria.name: `useAssetComments` fetches joined data in one query, filters `is_deleted=false` on both layers, orders by `discord_created_at` ascending, and SELECTs `discord_guild_id, discord_thread_id, discord_message_id` on every row
criteria.evidence: The hook uses one query and selects the required IDs, but only applies `.eq('is_deleted', false)` to `asset_comments`; `asset_comment_media.is_deleted` is filtered client-side after fetch (`useAssetComments.ts:148-159`), not in the query itself.

criteria.name: Setting `assets.is_hidden=true` on an imported asset makes it disappear from all four hook-backed surfaces and from `ResourceDetail` by URL
criteria.evidence: The four hook surfaces all filter `is_hidden = false` in code, and `useCommunityResource` also filters by it for the detail route, but browser/UI verification is not available in this review.

criteria.name: Existing website tests and Supabase type generation still pass after schema additions
criteria.evidence: Local website verification passed (`npm test -- --run` and `npm run build` succeeded in `banodoco-website`), but executor T3/T21 showed `supabase gen types` output still lacked `asset_comments` and `media_import_jobs` because the new schema was not applied to the linked project.

criteria.name: Resource cards show a subtle 'From Discord' badge with the channel friendly name for imported assets
criteria.evidence: `banodoco-website/src/pages/Resources/ResourceCard.tsx` renders `From Discord · <channel>` via `getDiscordResourceChannelName(...)`, but browser/UI verification is not available.

criteria.name: Media importer wall-clock stays under 400s per invocation; promoter (SQL) finishes in under 10s per run
criteria.evidence: No deployed runtime timing measurements were captured in this review context.

criteria.name: Health-check SQL returns usable output (stuck jobs, 24h failures, staleness, recent promoter/importer system_logs)
criteria.evidence: `supabase/sql/discord_sync_health.sql` exists, and executor T19 ran it successfully; on the undeployed target DB it returned explicit diagnostic rows for missing rollout tables and executed the `system_logs` query cleanly.

criteria.name: Rollback + follow-up doc exists and explicitly names deferred items (comment lightbox, Cloudflare duration webhook extension, supabase_vault migration)
criteria.evidence: `supabase/migrations/ROLLBACK_discord_sync.md` exists and explicitly lists the rollback order, risks, and the three deferred follow-ups.

criteria.name: No Cloudflare Stream quota / storage cost surprises during backfill
criteria.evidence: Info-only criterion; no automated judgment applied.

issues: `supabase db reset` still fails before the new Discord-sync migrations complete, and generated Supabase types do not yet reflect the new schema on the linked project.
Promoter dry-run/live rollout verification was not completed on the linked project, so zero-write dry-run behavior and EXPLAIN/index usage remain unproven.
Importer smoke tests and rehosted URL validation were not completed because the linked project lacked the deployed Discord-sync schema/queue.
The linked project still does not have the `discord-resource-promoter` and `discord-media-importer` cron jobs registered.
`useAssetComments` does not query-filter deleted `asset_comment_media` rows; it fetches them and removes them client-side.

rework_items.issue: The Discord-sync migration stack was not verified end-to-end on a clean reset, and generated types do not yet reflect the new schema.
rework_items.expected: `supabase db reset --no-seed --yes` should apply through the new Discord-sync migrations, and `supabase gen types` against the linked project should include the new `assets` fields plus `asset_comments`, `asset_comment_media`, and `media_import_jobs`.
rework_items.actual: Reset still halts at pre-existing migration `20260320000000_multi_server.sql` (`column c.speaker_mode does not exist`), and executor T3/T21 reported generated remote types still lacked the new Discord-sync tables.

rework_items.issue: The promoter rollout verification is incomplete on the linked project.
rework_items.expected: After deployment, the linked project should contain the new tables/function/index, `SELECT * FROM internal.discord_promote_resources(dry_run := TRUE)` should run with zero writes and per-channel info logs, and the discovery query should be verified against `discord_messages_resource_op_idx` with `EXPLAIN ANALYZE`.
rework_items.actual: Executor T6/T7 found `asset_comments`, `media_import_jobs`, `internal.discord_promote_resources(boolean)`, and `discord_messages_resource_op_idx` absent on the linked project, so the dry-run/live promoter criteria were never exercised there.

rework_items.issue: The importer end-to-end smoke path and URL verification are still unproven on the linked project.
rework_items.expected: A seeded video job and image job should import to `done`, create `media` and junction rows, exercise retry/backoff on failure, and produce rehosted URLs that return HTTP 200 (`#EXTM3U` for HLS, image content-type for images).
rework_items.actual: Executor T10 could not seed or run smoke tests because `media_import_jobs` and the rest of the Discord-sync rollout were absent on the linked project, so none of the required URL checks ran.

rework_items.issue: The Discord cron schedules are not present on the linked project.
rework_items.expected: `cron.job` should contain `discord-resource-promoter` on `*/10` and `discord-media-importer` on `*/2` after deployment.
rework_items.actual: Executor T11/T12 verified that both Discord cron jobs were still absent from `cron.job` on the linked project.

rework_items.issue: `useAssetComments` does not filter deleted junction rows in the query itself.
rework_items.expected: The single Supabase query should return only `asset_comment_media` rows where `is_deleted = false`, so deleted comment-media links are excluded server-side.
rework_items.actual: The hook queries all nested `asset_comment_media` rows, includes `is_deleted` in the payload, and then removes deleted links client-side with `.filter((link) => !link.is_deleted)`.

summary: Needs rework. Most of the requested code is present and it does resolve the earlier design flags in the diff: the SQL-native promoter exists, the importer follows the no-poll Cloudflare contract, the markdown/Discord UI work landed in the website, and there is no hard-coded `GUILD_ID`. The blockers are the remaining must-gate acceptance items: clean `supabase db reset` / applied-schema verification is still unresolved, promoter dry-run/live rollout was not completed on the linked project, importer smoke and URL checks were not completed, the cron jobs are not yet present on the target project, and `useAssetComments` still fetches deleted junction rows before filtering them client-side.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. The audit findings align with the inspected repo state and correctly captured the key contracts (`system_logs`, `cloudflare_stream_uid`, markdown pipeline, member FK target).
Pass. The five Phase 1 migration files exist and match the planned schema changes.

Fail. The clean-reset acceptance gate remains unmet; the migration chain still stops before the Discord-sync migrations can be validated, and generated project types do not yet reflect the new schema.
Pass. The promoter function implements the settled SQL-native design, including anti-join inserts, guild propagation, drift updates, attachment reconciliation, and proper logging.
Pass. The promoter cron migration schedules the function via direct SQL with no HTTP hop.
Fail. The required dry-run milestone and EXPLAIN/index verification were not completed on the linked project because the new objects were not deployed there.
Fail. Live promoter verification and the planned regression checks were not executed on the linked project.
Pass. The importer implementation is present and follows the intended claim/upload/webhook/backoff design.
Pass. The importer/webhook contract matches on `cloudflare_stream_uid`.
Fail. The importer smoke path, failure-path exercise, and rehosted URL checks were not completed on the linked project.
Fail. The cron migration files exist, but the linked project still lacks the expected Discord cron jobs and seeded-secret verification.
Fail. Full backfill observation was not completed because the rollout never reached a deployed, schedulable state on the linked project.
Pass. The four resource hook surfaces now select the Discord import fields and filter `is_hidden = false`.
Pass. `AssetDescription` is a thin wrapper around the existing `MarkdownRenderer` pipeline.
Pass. Both `ResourceDetail` and `ResourceModal` now render descriptions through `AssetDescription`.
Fail. The hook exists and uses one joined query, but it does not query-filter deleted `asset_comment_media` rows as required.
Pass. The live resource page now renders the Discord-only discussion/made-with sections and builds jump links from row data with no hard-coded guild constant.
Pass. Resource cards now render the subtle Discord badge via the shared channel-name helper.
Pass. The health SQL file exists and is written defensively enough to return usable diagnostics even before rollout tables are deployed.
Pass. The rollback document exists and covers drop order, risks, and deferred follow-ups.
Fail. Local website build/test and the scratch repro script passed, but the full end-to-end acceptance gate remains incomplete because reset/deployment/runtime rollout criteria were not closed.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed. The audit captured the real `system_logs` shape, webhook lookup column, markdown pipeline, and guild-id risk context.
Confirmed. The expected migration files are present and contain the planned schema changes.
Not satisfied. Clean reset still fails before the Discord-sync migrations can be validated.
Confirmed. The promoter logic matches Step 8 materially; the only deviation is the benign `dry_run_result` output-column rename.
Confirmed. The promoter cron is direct SQL with no HTTP transport.
Not satisfied. The dry-run milestone and index-usage verification were not completed on the linked project.
Not satisfied. Live promoter regression coverage was not executed on the linked project.
Partially confirmed. The importer code matches the intended design, but the runtime proof was not completed.
Confirmed. The importer and webhook both use `cloudflare_stream_uid`.
Not satisfied. The requested video/image smoke checks and URL verification were not executed.
Not satisfied. The schedule files exist, but the linked project still lacked both cron jobs and seeded-secret confirmation.
Not satisfied. No deployed backfill run was observed.
Confirmed. The four hook surfaces now select the Discord fields and filter `is_hidden = false`.
Confirmed. `AssetDescription` reuses `MarkdownRenderer`.
Confirmed in code. Both description call sites now use `AssetDescription`.
Failed. `useAssetComments` does not server-filter deleted `asset_comment_media` rows.
Confirmed in code. ResourceDetail gates the Discord sections and builds links from row data; runtime UI remains manual.
Confirmed in code. The ResourceCard badge is present via the shared channel helper; runtime UI remains manual.
Confirmed. `discord_sync_health.sql` contains all four requested query groups and produced usable diagnostic output.
Confirmed. `ROLLBACK_discord_sync.md` covers rollback order, risks, and deferred follow-ups.
Partially satisfied. Local website test/build and the scratch promoter repro passed, but full reset/deployment/runtime rollout verification remains incomplete and browser automation was unavailable.
